name: STRATS SM TRUST FOR U S CELL CORP SEC SERIES 2004 6
summary: STRATS Trust for United States Cellular Corporation Securities, Series 2004-6 is a statutory trust that holds securities related to United States Cellular Corporation. It issues Class A-1 Certificates representing investors' interests, which are listed on the NYSE and registered in the name of Cede & Co., nominee of The Depository Trust Company. The trust makes periodic distributions to certificateholders and files related reports with the SEC.
